name: Week 1 coverage
description: Checks that the repaired Agent selects the typed week lookup tool.

parts.text: Which glossary concepts were introduced in Week 1?

Week 1 introduced seven glossary concepts: [Agent](https://absurdwall.github.io/search-agent-study-group/glossary/#agent), [Context window](https://absurdwall.github.io/search-agent-study-group/glossary/#context-window), [Google Agent Development Kit (ADK)](https://absurdwall.github.io/search-agent-study-group/glossary/#google-adk), [Large language model (LLM)](https://absurdwall.github.io/search-agent-study-group/glossary/#large-language-model), [Prompt](https://absurdwall.github.io/search-agent-study-group/glossary/#prompt), [System prompt](https://absurdwall.github.io/search-agent-study-group/glossary/#system-prompt), and [Tool](https://absurdwall.github.io/search-agent-study-group/glossary/#tool).
